steps.name: Prepare team via backend  (owner + members + conversation)
Login as team member in Android app
Assert conversation name and open Settings from conversation menu entry
Verify Enable Logging toggle works in Debug Settings
Enable App Lock and set passcode
Open Account Details and verify current email + domain
Change email address and verify confirmation notification
Fetch email verification link from test mailbox
Bring Wire app back to foreground
Verify new email is visible in Account Details
